'''鈭歠-r-sh''' ('''kafarash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xpost|xpost]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-r-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xpost|xpost]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-r-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kafarash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifarash|thifarash]] || [[word:jifarash|jifarash]] || [[word:shifarash|shifarash]] || [[word:kifarash|kifarash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufarash|thuthufarash]] || [[word:jujufarash|jujufarash]] || [[word:shushufarash|shushufarash]] || [[word:kukufarash|kukufarash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufarash|thufarash]] || [[word:jufarash|jufarash]] || [[word:shufarash|shufarash]] || [[word:kufarash|kufarash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufarash|thufarash]] || [[word:jufarash|jufarash]] || [[word:shufarash|shufarash]] || [[word:kufarash|kufarash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefarash|thefarash]] || [[word:jefarash|jefarash]] || [[word:shefarash|shefarash]] || [[word:kefarash|kefarash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofarash|thothofarash]] || [[word:jojofarash|jojofarash]] || [[word:shoshofarash|shoshofarash]] || [[word:kokofarash|kokofarash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofarash|thofarash]] || [[word:jofarash|jofarash]] || [[word:shofarash|shofarash]] || [[word:kofarash|kofarash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofarash|thofarash]] || [[word:jofarash|jofarash]] || [[word:shofarash|shofarash]] || [[word:kofarash|kofarash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:farash|farash]] || [[word:farash|farash]] || [[word:farash|farash]] || [[word:farash|farash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:farash|farash]] || [[word:farash|farash]] || [[word:farash|farash]] || [[word:farash|farash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:farash|farash]] || [[word:farash|farash]] || [[word:farash|farash]] || [[word:farash|farash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:farash|farash]] || [[word:farash|farash]] || [[word:farash|farash]] || [[word:farash|farash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙farash|th忙farash]] || [[word:j忙farash|j忙farash]] || [[word:sh忙farash|sh忙farash]] || [[word:k忙farash|k忙farash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafarash|thathafarash]] || [[word:jajafarash|jajafarash]] || [[word:shashafarash|shashafarash]] || [[word:kakafarash|kakafarash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafarash|thafarash]] || [[word:jafarash|jafarash]] || [[word:shafarash|shafarash]] || [[word:kafarash|kafarash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafarash|thafarash]] || [[word:jafarash|jafarash]] || [[word:shafarash|shafarash]] || [[word:kafarash|kafarash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafarash|shafarash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafarash|goshafarash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafarash|gokishafarash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafarashn眉|shafarashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafarashnkn眉|goshafarashnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafarashn眉|gokishafarashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafarashsh毛|shafarashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafarashnksh毛|goshafarashnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafarashsh毛|gokishafarashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafarashro|shafarashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafarashnkro|goshafarashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafarashro|gokishafarashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafarashmu|shafarashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafarashnkmu|goshafarashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafarashmu|gokishafarashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafarashsher|shafarashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafarashnksher|goshafarashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafarashsher|gokishafarashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafarashng|shafarashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafarashnkng|goshafarashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafarashng|gokishafarashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafarashya|shafarashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafarashnkya|goshafarashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafarashya|gokishafarashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafarashyam|shafarashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafarashnkyam|goshafarashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafarashyam|gokishafarashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafarashn眉sh毛|shafarashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafarashnkn眉sh毛|goshafarashnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafarashn眉sh毛|gokishafarashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafarashn眉ro|shafarashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafarashnkn眉ro|goshafarashnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafarashn眉ro|gokishafarashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafarashn眉mu|shafarashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafarashnkn眉mu|goshafarashnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafarashn眉mu|gokishafarashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafarashsh毛n眉|shafarashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafarashnksh毛n眉|goshafarashnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafarashsh毛n眉|gokishafarashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafarashsh毛ro|shafarashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafarashnksh毛ro|goshafarashnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafarashsh毛ro|gokishafarashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafarashsh毛mu|shafarashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafarashnksh毛mu|goshafarashnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafarashsh毛mu|gokishafarashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafarashron眉|shafarashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafarashnkron眉|goshafarashnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafarashron眉|gokishafarashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafarashrosh毛|shafarashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafarashnkrosh毛|goshafarashnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafarashrosh毛|gokishafarashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafarashromu|shafarashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafarashnkromu|goshafarashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafarashromu|gokishafarashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafarashmun眉|shafarashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafarashnkmun眉|goshafarashnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafarashmun眉|gokishafarashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafarashmush毛|shafarashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafarashnkmush毛|goshafarashnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafarashmush毛|gokishafarashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafarashmuro|shafarashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafarashnkmuro|goshafarashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafarashmuro|gokishafarashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
